scripts.android:boot-and-run: sh -c '"$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb" wait-for-device; until "$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | grep -q 1; do sleep 2; done; "$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb" reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081; cd android && ./gradlew app:installDebug; "$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb" shell am start -n com.cashfreehybridapp/.MainActivity'
scripts.ios:build-install-launch: sh -c 'xcrun simctl boot "iPhone 17 Pro" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; open -a Simulator; xcodebuild -workspace ios/CashfreeHybridApp.xcworkspace -scheme CashfreeHybridApp -configuration Debug -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro,OS=26.4" -derivedDataPath ios/build build && xcrun simctl install booted ios/build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/CashfreeHybridApp.app && xcrun simctl launch booted org.reactjs.native.example.CashfreeHybridApp'
scripts.dev:android: concurrently -k -s first "cd backend && npm run dev" "npm start" "npm run android:boot-and-run"
scripts.dev:ios: concurrently -k -s first "cd backend && npm run dev" "npm start" "npm run ios:build-install-launch"
